title: bolbitis subcrenata subsp. terminans
intro: Bolbitis subcrenata subsp. terminans, a rare and lesser-known species of the Bolbitis genus of ferns, is native to Southeast Asia and is characterized by its unique fronds with crenate and undulate margins. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may be attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential use as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, Bolbitis subcrenata subsp. terminans is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its use as a traditional remedy continues to be explored in modern scientific research.
